product_owned_code.invariant: 预分配 child identity、durable dispatch、同 identity inspect、Runtime/Agent fork、Host binding、Product graph transaction、activation、Lost 按唯一顺序推进
Full 只走 exact ForkParentHistory；Fresh 只走 typed initial context evidence、activation、first SubmitInput exactly-once
UI/API 只消费 ManagedRuntimeSnapshot、ManagedRuntimeChangePage、command_availability；gap 必须 reload snapshot

shared_owner_dependencies.required_change: 提供 durable host/state repository seam、Product fork/fresh adapter、Business Surface/Tool Broker production binding
exact history fork 返回 child coordinate/digest；Fresh 返回可核验 context evidence
实现唯一 migration/repository adapter、切 composition/canonical generator、删除 journal/RuntimeSession/legacy crate

parity: snapshot revision、change cursor、thread/turn/item/interaction projection 原样对齐
command availability 只从同 revision canonical snapshot 读取
Compaction phase/receipt/change 与 Runtime Contract 原样对齐
cursor gap 返回 typed gap 并 reload snapshot，再从 snapshot revision 读取 tail
forbidden_projection: frontend 根据 product status、journal arrival 或 worker timing 推断 availability/activity
API 把 Runtime events 转成 SessionEventResponse/Backbone journal 作为恢复事实
generator 为 W7 schema 建立第二套 canonical root

activation_order: 固定 Platform Runtime Contract、Complete Agent Host persistence 与 Tool Broker symbols
固定 Dash/Native exact fork 与 fresh context evidence receipts
实现 W8 agent_run_fork_saga 与 companion_fresh_saga PostgreSQL adapters/migration
切 canonical Rust/TypeScript generator roots、API routes 与 frontend feed
删除 journal、RuntimeSession delivery/live、Core AgentTool assembly 与 legacy crates
运行 architecture negative gates、restart matrix 与 direct/fork/Companion/reconnect tracer bullets
breakpoints: CompleteAgentHost 当前仍以内存 state 构造，未注入 durable repository；此处不允许 Product 自建旁路持久化
production Companion dispatch 仍由 RepositorySet 直接构造 Lifecycle graph；在 exact/fresh adapter 就绪前不能局部替换
canonical generated roots 与正式 migration 只能由 W8 在同一 hard cut 修改
任何一个六 caller 仍引用 AgentTool、RuntimeToolProvider、RuntimeSession 或 AgentRunJournalService 时不得激活
